hats [300046106], headgear [300209285], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

body armor for the head [300212545], body armor for neck and head [300205385], body armor [300036746], armor by form [300210822], armor (protective wear) [300036745], protective wear [300209266], costume by function [300212133], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Any of various forms of protective coverings for the head, usually made of a hard material, including the outside steel layer of helmets that consist of inner and outer parts.
Una de los varias formas de cobertura protectora para la cabeza, generalmente realizado de materiales duros.
Beschermende hoofddeksels, meestal gemaakt van een hard materiaal.
指各式戴於頭部的防護性覆蓋物，通常以堅硬材質製成。
Verschiedene Formen von Schutzbedeckungen für den Kopf, in der Regel aus einem harten Material.

Copricapo a coppa di metallo o cuoio, usato come arma difensiva della testa, o come protezione contro eventuale cadute o urti o anche contro le intemperanze del clima fino a dopo la metà del XII secolo.

Source.Source_ID: 2000109640/ICCD, Strumenti terminologici: Beni Storici e Artistici Thesaurus (1988-)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Miac tlamantli cuatzauccayotl tlen quipalehuia totzontecon para ma axquiahci ce tlamantli, nochipa mochihchiuhtoc ica ce tlamantli tlahuel chicahuac.
أي من الأشكال المختلفة للأغطية الواقية للرأس، عادة ما تكون مصنوعة من مادة صلبة، بما في ذلك الطبقة الفولاذية الخارجية للخوذات التي تتكون من أجزاء داخلية وخارجية.

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.
